## Checklist

- [ ] I edited the **templates** (`templates/*.tmpl`), not rendered scripts
- [ ] `tests/run-tests.sh` passes, and I added a test for any new behavior
- [ ] `shellcheck` is clean
- [ ] **No new code path writes to the memory source directory** (invariant #1)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
